text:
{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>Die <BIBL><TITLE>Mangoldische Bibel</TITLE> <YEAR>1729</YEAR></BIBL>. Die <BIBL><TITLE>Jelische Lexicon</TITLE> <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Stettlers</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Schweitzer-Chronick</TITLE></BIBL>, das <BIBL><TITLE>Reich der Todten</TITLE></BIBL>, samt noch einigen anderen neuen frantzösisch historischen Bücheren, davon der Catalogus bey Herrn <PERSON>M. Daniel Meyer</PERSON> im <LOCATION>Collegio</LOCATION> zu sehen ist, als welcher diese Bücher zu verkauffen in Commi­ssion hat.</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":7,"explanation":"
1. CLOSED MISSING `</BIBL>` TAG around Stettlers entry: The third `<BIBL>` block was never closed — it now wraps `<AUTHOR>Stettlers</AUTHOR>` and `<TITLE>Schweitzer-Chronick</TITLE>` and is properly closed with `</BIBL>`.
2. SEPARATED second TITLE into its own BIBL: `<TITLE>Reich der Todten</TITLE>` appeared inside the unclosed third `<BIBL>` but is a distinct bibliographic item, so it has been wrapped in its own `<BIBL>...</BIBL>`.
3. ADDED `<PERSON>` tag around "M. Daniel Meyer", who is a named individual referenced in the text.
4. ADDED `<LOCATION>` tag around "Collegio", which is a named place referenced in the text.
5. FIXED corrupted Unicode character `√∂` → `ö` (frantzösisch).
6. FIXED corrupted Unicode characters `√ºcheren` / `√ºcher` → `ü` (Bücheren / Bücher).
7. FIXED corrupted Unicode character `√ºcion` → `ssion` (Commission), and normalized the soft-hyphen split "Commi­ssion".
"}
